triage_profile.key_note: CP1 override: keywords don't capture relay-through-Olivia pattern. Elevated to Tier 1 full pass. Primary signal landscape identified through cross-RF analysis: RF-01 ADD-004 relay signals (B-007-B-028) + ROW-6819 coaching admission (B-018) + Naomi's-father peer-parent relay (B-031). 5 keyword hits are false-positive / logistics noise.

cross_rf_context.cross_rf_note: Primary RF-08 signal source is RF-01 ADD-004 relay pattern (Melissa using Olivia to deliver alienating content and to source intelligence about Eli's household). ROW-6819 (B-018) is the explicit coaching admission that anchors the arc. RF-04 B-031 peer-parent relay (ROW-15592) introduces the Naomi's-father mechanism. RF-02 ARC-RF02-001 (required-intermediary) is structurally related but distinct: RF-08 flags use of the CHILD as conduit, not adult intermediaries.

key_findings.arc_anchor: ROW-6819 (B-018, Aug 19-20 2024): 'I've told her to have conversations and I also give her things to tell you about. I remind her of some of the things she's told me' — explicit written coaching admission; Sev-3 primary; ARC-RF08-001 activation event
key_findings.pre_signal_phase: B-007 through B-010 (Apr-Oct 2023): 3 Sev-1 pre-signals documenting early relay framing and intelligence-channel assertion
key_findings.post_activation_pattern: Physical harm allegations via Olivia (B-019 Sep 2024); abandonment arc relay in Olivia's voice (B-022 Feb 2025); visit refusal cascade relay (B-028 Aug 2025)
key_findings.peer_parent_relay: ROW-15592 (B-031 Apr 12 2026): Naomi's father cited as corroborating witness for Olivia's distress — peer-parent network relay mechanism introduced at dataset close
key_findings.abby_targeting: Behavioral loyalty coaching confirmed via Olivia's gift-giving pattern (CP2 Q5) — no standalone primary flag but applies as severity context for relay signals involving Abby

session_log.notes: RF-08 pass initialized. B-001 calibration batch processed (365 messages, Jan 11-Oct 2 2022). Zero primary RF-08 flags — confirms low baseline in cooperative early period. Arc state initialized at CANDIDATE. 5 calibration questions generated. Halted per protocol awaiting CP2.

CP2 calibration completed. Q5 answered (Abby behavioral loyalty coaching confirmed). Q1-Q4 unanswered — conservative defaults applied per addenda. 4 addenda confirmed. Full pass completed B-002 through B-031 in single session. 11 primary signals: 4 Sev-1 (S001-S003 pre-signals + S008), 6 Sev-2 (S005-S007, S009-S011), 1 Sev-3 (S004 ROW-6819 coaching admission). 11 compound patterns (9 RF-08+RF-01; 2 RF-08+RF-04; 1 triple RF-08+RF-01+RF-15; 1 triple RF-08+RF-01+RF-02). ARC-RF08-001 unresolved at dataset close. Key finding: ROW-6819 (Aug 2024) is the explicit written coaching admission — 'I've told her to have conversations and I also give her things to tell you about. I remind her of some of the things she's told me.' Peer-parent relay introduced at B-031 (Naomi's father, ROW-15592).
